title: Dating Abuse Hotlines - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Crisis Hotlines > Dating Abuse Hotlines 5 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CLACKAMAS WOMEN'S SERVICES DOMESTIC VIOLENCE AND SEXUAL ASSAULT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis line, confidential text and chat line, emergency shelter and transitional housing services, legal advocacy to assist with temporary restraining orders, safety planning, housing advocacy and financial empowerment programs, violence prevention, and community education. 256 Warner Milne Road Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault or sex industry, and older adults experiencing elder abuse Hours: Crisis line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week All other assistance: Varies by service Email (888) 654-2288 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BOYS TOWN NATIONAL HOTLINE YOUR LIFE YOUR VOICE HELP SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 24-hour crisis, resource, and referral line. Crisis counselors provide support for issues such as abuse, anger, anxiety, bullying, coping skills, dating and break-ups, depression, eating disorders, grief, parenting and relationship problems, self-esteem, self-injury, school, stress, suicide, and self-care. Offers a mobile app with a mood journal to track feelings in writing or emojis and get tips on how to identify triggers or deal with stressful situations. 14100 Crawford Street Boys Town, NE 68010 Eligibility: At-risk children and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 448-3000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SERVICES INC PENDLETON ADVOCACY CENTER 24 HOUR CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis line for domestic violence, dating violence, stalking, and sexual assault. Services include safety planning, confidential abuse assessments, and advocacy. 1103 SE Court Place Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 833-1161 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DOVE ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy, protective order assistance, emergency shelter, safety planning, court and medical accompaniment, referrals, support groups, and a crisis line. 726 N 1st Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault, stalking, dating violence, human trafficking, and elder abuse. Also serves individulas with disabilities who are victims of abuse. Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Crisis line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 947-2449 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL DOMESTIC VIOLENCE HOTLINE LOVE IS RESPECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hotline with one-on-one, confidential support. Trained advocates can offer emotional support, education, safety planning information, crisis intervention, and local resource referrals for situations relating to healthy relationships and dating abuse. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (737) 225-3150 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS WOMEN'S SERVICES DOMESTIC VIOLENCE AND SEXUAL ASSAULT SERVICES DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SERVICES INC 24 HOUR CRISIS LINE DOVE ADVOCACY CENTER DOVE ADVOCACY CENTER
